plugins.name: Inworld AI TTS
plugins.description: Free TTS using Inworld AI. Chunks are synthesized in parallel by the LNReader TTS engine.
plugins.author: LNReader

plugins.name: Edge TTS
plugins.description: Microsoft Edge TTS using a direct WebSocket connection. No proxy or Docker needed.
plugins.author: LNReader

plugins.name: Cartesia Sonic (Free)
plugins.description: Free Cartesia Sonic TTS using public playground tokens. Extremely fast and high quality.
plugins.author: LNReader

plugins.name: ElevenLabs TTS
plugins.description: Premium ElevenLabs TTS supporting API-key authenticated mode and hCaptcha anonymous mode. Returns MP3 audio.
plugins.author: LNReader

plugins.name: Kokoro TTS (DeepInfra)
plugins.description: Kokoro TTS via DeepInfra. State-of-the-art open-source TTS with multi-language voices, voice blending, and speed control. Requires a DeepInfra API key.
plugins.author: LNReader

plugins.name: Murf TTS
plugins.description: Free Murf.ai anonymous TTS with high-fidelity studio voices. No API key required.
plugins.author: LNReader

plugins.name: Kyutai TTS
plugins.description: Free Kyutai TTS via WebSocket streaming. 200+ voices, no API key required. Returns 24 kHz WAV.
plugins.author: LNReader
